title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 137.420 - False certification a misdemeanor
text:
137.420.  False certification a misdemeanor. — Any false certification to any statement filed by any person with the county assessor under sections 137.325 to 137.420, made with intent to defraud, shall constitute a misdemeanor and be punishable as such.
(L. 1945 p. 1930 § 21)
